description: Route-C P5 anomaly and chiral-consistency ledger

baseline.spectrum: Q + L + u^c + d^c + nu^c + e^c

candidates.contains_nu_c: yes, but as an SU(5) singlet
candidates.chiral_exotics_status: none for one SM family plus singlet
candidates.route_c_status: anomaly-consistent but fails the single irreducible family object criterion
missing_audits: embedding comparison if the single-object criterion is relaxed
proton and threshold audits for an SU(5)-specific branch

candidates.chiral_exotics_status: none for the standard family pair

anomaly_checks.name: SU(2)_L Witten anomaly
anomaly_checks.formula: four SU(2)_L doublets from dim(4)=4, even

anomaly_checks.name: SU(2)_R Witten anomaly
anomaly_checks.formula: four SU(2)_R doublets from dim(bar4)=4, even

candidates.route_c_status: anomaly-consistent and physically natural, but fails the simple-group and single-object filters
missing_audits: explicit product-group bootstrap branch if simplicity is relaxed
broken-sector Ward and proton audits for Pati-Salam leptoquark currents

anomaly_checks.name: Spin(10)^3 perturbative anomaly
anomaly_checks.formula: D5 has no independent cubic gauge-anomaly invariant; 16 is anomaly-safe

anomaly_checks.name: Spin(10) global anomaly
anomaly_checks.formula: pi_4(Spin(10))=0 in the standard four-dimensional check

candidates.route_c_status: standard minimal anomaly-safe single-object survivor under the stated Route-C pre-filter
missing_audits: explicit broken-generator matrices for Ward checks
full low-energy proton and threshold matching

candidates.chiral_exotics_status: extra 10 + 1 must be lifted or otherwise accounted for

anomaly_checks.name: E6^3 perturbative anomaly
anomaly_checks.formula: E6 has no independent cubic gauge-anomaly invariant for the 27

anomaly_checks.name: extra-state anomaly pairing after restriction
anomaly_checks.formula: 27 contains 16 plus vectorlike 10 and singlet under Spin(10)

candidates.route_c_status: anomaly-consistent, but not minimal and requires an extra-state lifting audit
missing_audits: check that exotics do not reintroduce low-energy chiral matter

candidates.category: UV-completion class, not a single four-dimensional group
candidates.family_realization: model-dependent; may realize SU(5), Pati-Salam, Spin(10), E6, or other quiver/brane/heterotic branches
candidates.chiral_exotics_status: compactification-dependent; exotics must be absent, vectorlike, or lifted

anomaly_checks.name: higher-dimensional anomaly cancellation
anomaly_checks.formula: Green-Schwarz/tadpole/modular consistency as appropriate to the string construction

anomaly_checks.name: four-dimensional anomaly cancellation
anomaly_checks.formula: massless spectrum plus any 4D Green-Schwarz terms must cancel anomalies

anomaly_checks.name: worldsheet or compactification consistency
anomaly_checks.formula: modular invariance, tadpole cancellation, K-theory/Freed-Witten-type constraints where applicable

candidates.route_c_status: UV-completion class with stronger high-energy softness/tower structure, but requires compactification-specific spectrum and exotics audits
missing_audits: matching to the Route-A representation/index skeleton

boundary: Anomaly consistency is necessary but not sufficient.  The ledger does not perform Ward, high-energy, proton, threshold, or compactification audits.
